w:r.w:t: Mara opened the rusted gate and swore she had not visited this town since childhood.
By sunset she described, in detail, the bakery she admitted she once knew well.
Jon carried one lantern into the tunnel and later hung that same lantern on the wall.
The timeline now tracks from Monday dawn to Monday midnight in a single paragraph.
Mara promised never to lie, then hides a letter and denies seeing it.
The chapter ends with a clear cliffhanger for continuity and character review tests.
